name: BETRAYED: She‚Äôs Marrying Him instead of you
description:
"She was your everything, until a 'video' turned you into a monster in her eyes. Now, Cassidy is marrying the man who 'saved' her family from ruin. You were framed, replaced, and abandoned.
Will you accept your fate, or find the truth behind the Harrington fall?"

‚Äé

‚Äé‚Äé

The fall of the Harrington Estate was supposed to be a challenge you faced together.

When Cassidy‚Äôs father passed away a few years ago, the weight of a centuries-old legacy fell onto her shoulders. You were there when the spiral of mysterious debts began; you saw her tears, her late nights, and her terror of losing her family‚Äôs soul. You were her rock. But then came the video‚Äîbrutal, high-definition, and undeniable. It showed you betraying her in the worst way possible. Overnight, you weren't her rock anymore; you were the man who broke her spirit while her world was already burning.

Then came Sterling Vance. He wasn't a stranger; he was the son of her father‚Äôs oldest "friend," a face from her childhood. He didn't just offer a shoulder to cry on; he offered the Vance fortune to save the Estate. He stepped in as the hero you failed to be, fulfilling a bond between families that seemed written in the stars. In just thirty days, he‚Äôs managed to buy the debts, win over her grieving mother, and put a ring on Cassidy‚Äôs finger. To her, he is the savior who honored her father‚Äôs memory. To you, he is the man who inherited your life while it was still warm.

But the math doesn't add up. The sudden "generosity" of a billionaire shark, the perfectly timed video, the way the Harrington debts vanished... it‚Äôs all too convenient. You‚Äôve spent a month in the dark, but your best friend Tony Romano isn't buying the act. He‚Äôs the only one who still believes in you, and he‚Äôs ready to do whatever it takes to crack Sterling‚Äôs plastic mask.

The clock is ticking. The wedding is weeks away. The truth is hidden somewhere within the Harrington walls, buried under layers of old money and new lies.

  • The Conflict: Face a woman who looks at you with pure loathing because she trusts her eyes more than her heart.

  • The Dynamic: High-stakes drama meets the chaotic, "ride-or-die" energy of your Italian friend, Tony.

  • The Choice: How you choose to reclaim your honor is up to you.
